remarks: Newly renovated, bright and sunny Large One Bedroom Unit. Heat, Hot Water and Cooking Gas included in rent!! Brand new S/S appliances!! Short Walk to SoNo Train station, SoNO Collection Mall, Maritime Aquarium! Freshly painted, Large Deck and recessed lighting throughout the unit. X-Large walk in closet + Huge Pantry and Lots of storage complete this unit. Steps from the vibrant SoNo District! Washer / Dryer in unit + full bath with tub. Brand New and efficient AC. Close to restaurants, entertainment and nightlife. Reserved Parking. Come book your appointment today!
